title: Att dwar Atti Nutarili (Provvedimenti Temporanji) Imħassar bl-Att XXIV tal-2011
title_en: Att dwar Atti Nutarili (Provvedimenti Temporanji) Imħassar bl-Att XXIV tal-2011
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/cap/408/mlt, expression eli/cap/408/20130101/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
ATTI NUTARILI (PROVVEDIMENTI TEMPORANJI)

[ KAP. 408.

KAPITOLU 408
ATT DWAR ATTI NUTARILI
(PROVVEDIMENTI TEMPORANJI)
Biex jipprovdi dwar it-tqegħid ta’ Atti Nutarili fl-Arkivji qabel ma dawn
jiġu spezzjonati skont l-artikolu 117 tal-Att dwar il-Professjoni Nutarili u
l-Arkivji Nutarili, Kap. 55.

12 ta’ Lulju, 1999
L-ATT X tal-1999 , kif emendat bl-Att VI tal-2001 .

(Imħassar bl-Att XXIV. 2011.103(13)(f))

1
